narrative:
West Jefferson B (precinct in Madison County) has 1,171 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
